message:
🌱 Add Claude Code local files to .gitignore

Ignore:
- .bob/ - Claude Code build outputs
- CLAUDE.md - Local project instructions
- bin/ - Local binaries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,3 +56,9 @@ vendor/
 # Coordination file (local only)
 .claude-coord.md
 /kkc-agent
+
+# Claude Code local files
+.bob/
+CLAUDE.md
+TASKS.md
+bin/
